name: Dwarven Thrower
attunement_requirement: Requires Attunement by a Dwarf or a Creature Attuned to a Belt of Dwarvenkind
overview: A magical warhammer that returns after being thrown and deals extra damage to giants.

properties.attack_bonus: You gain a +3 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon
properties.thrown_property: It has the Thrown property with a normal range of 20 feet and a long range of 60 feet

ranged_attack.extra_damage_normal: When you hit with a ranged attack using this weapon, it deals an extra 1d8 Force damage
ranged_attack.extra_damage_giant: Or an extra 2d8 Force damage if the target is a Giant

return.description: Immediately after hitting or missing, the weapon flies back to your hand
